subject: status
body: Supervisor check-in: you've been on #115 (OpenCode telemetry parity) for ~40 min with no PR up yet. All good? Reply with a one-liner: on track / blocked / ETA. If blocked, say on what and I'll help unblock. Also FYI: #130 (website copy + anchor-scroll polish) is open and unclaimed if you finish and want a small follow-up.
